resources.string: o kama pona tawa lipu Lichess!
jan lili li kepeken ala kepeken sijelo ni? kepeken la, ken la sina wile open e %s
tenpo ni la seme? ken la sina wile ni:

string.name: learnChessRules
string.comment: This used to be "Learn chess rules", without a full stop. Please update as required.

resources.string: o kama sona e lawa pi musi ni
o wawa e sona sina kepeken musi lili
utala e jan ante lon musi ni
kama poka tawa jan pona sina
ante e ilo Lichess tawa wile sina
